nodes.name: Prepare Annual Container Procurement Plan
nodes.notes: Consider volume assumptions, damages, new accounts, supplier capacity, event container injection

nodes.name: Update Monthly Container Procurement Plan and Present in MFR
nodes.notes: YTG period update considering volume, damages, new accounts, supplier capacity, event containers

nodes.name: Approve Procurement Plan Variance (≥5%)

thresholds.parameter: Procurement variance vs last month plan
thresholds.action: BEO approval required if variance ≥5%

nodes.notes: Variance threshold: 5% and above vs. last month plan requires BEO approval

nodes.name: Receive and Record New Empty Containers in ACW/SAP
nodes.timing: At time of new empty induction
nodes.notes: DC creates supplier delivery document in ACW and maintains quantity in SAP

nodes.name: Create Batch Code in ACW for Filled Containers
nodes.notes: Batch code created with quantity received from Production

nodes.name: Generate Filled Container Invoice and ACW DN with Seal Number
nodes.notes: DN printed in 6 copies: Orgonia DC, Factory Gate, Transporter, Distributor Receiving, Distributor Warehouse, Distributor Head Office

nodes.name: Seal Truck and Document Seal Number on Invoice and DN
nodes.responsible: Truck Inspector, Loading & Offloading Captain, Invoicing Assistant

thresholds.action: Do not dispatch if seal cannot be applied; investigate any pre-dispatch tampering

nodes.notes: CCP: Seal number documented on invoice and DN. Failure = untracked container loss downstream

nodes.name: Verify Seal Integrity on Arrival (Empty Containers)

thresholds.action: If tampered: do not open, inform DCM/ASM/RSM, investigate and conclude before accepting

nodes.notes: CCP: Tampered seal = container shortage/contamination risk. Immediate escalation required

nodes.name: Charge Transporter for Short Empty Containers

thresholds.action: Charge transporter (Empty Container cost + Water selling price)

nodes.notes: CCP: Shortage charged at Empty Container + Water selling price

nodes.name: Validate ACW DN Before Offloading Empty Containers
nodes.responsible: Invoicing Assistant, Loading & Offloading Captain, DCC
nodes.notes: No offloading without validated DN in ACW

nodes.name: Receive and Approve DN in ACW Real-Time Per Quantity Received
nodes.responsible: Invoicing Assistant, Loading & Offloading Captain, DCC
nodes.notes: Real-time DN approval per quantity received. Short containers: inform ASM/RSM/DCM immediately, obtain driver acknowledgment, receive DN highlighting shorts

nodes.name: Investigate Short Containers and Conclude Root Cause
nodes.accountable: DCM, RSM, SCC, NSC, BUC, BEO
nodes.notes: RCA and way forward determination per SOP section 2.7

nodes.name: Identify and Segregate NFFP Containers at DC
nodes.responsible: Loading & Offloading Captain, DCC, AM SC
nodes.notes: NFFP = Not Fit for Production containers identified and segregated

nodes.name: Handover NFFP Containers from Plant to DC
nodes.notes: Plant-to-DC NFFP container transfer

nodes.notes: Quality complaint containers from distributor to Orgonia DC and head office

nodes.name: Pick Quality Complaint Containers from Customer
nodes.notes: Direct customer quality complaint container retrieval

nodes.name: Distributor Receives Filled Containers and Verifies Seal Integrity

thresholds.action: If tampered: do not offload, inform Orgonia DC/ASM immediately, investigate before acceptance

nodes.notes: CCP: Distributor verifies seal on filled container receipt. Tampering = product integrity risk

nodes.name: Distributor Receives DN and Records Filled Containers in ACW
nodes.notes: Distributor records filled containers in ACW using DN

nodes.name: Distributor Reports Shortage on Filled Container Receipt
nodes.notes: Distributor shortage reporting on filled container delivery

nodes.notes: Distributor invoicing to end customers

nodes.name: Distributor Receives Empty Containers from Customers
nodes.notes: Distributor receives empty containers from retail/residential/corporate customers

nodes.name: Distributor Segregates and Records NFFP Containers
nodes.notes: Distributor identifies and segregates NFFP containers for return to DC

nodes.name: Distributor Prepares Empty Container DN for Return to DC
nodes.notes: Distributor creates ACW DN for empty container returns to Orgonia DC

nodes.name: Distributor Seals Truck for Empty Container Return

thresholds.action: Document seal number on DN; do not dispatch if seal cannot be applied

nodes.notes: CCP: Distributor seals truck with empty containers. Seal number documented on DN

nodes.name: Conduct Daily Container Stock Count at DC
nodes.notes: Daily physical stock count at DC

nodes.notes: Weekly physical stock count at DC

nodes.notes: Monthly physical container count at DC for reconciliation

nodes.notes: Monthly physical container count at Distributor warehouse

nodes.notes: Distributor monthly reconciliation report submission to Orgonia

nodes.notes: DC reconciles all distributor container balances in ACW

nodes.notes: National-level container reconciliation across all DCs and distributors

nodes.name: Present National Container Variance in MOR
nodes.notes: National container variance presentation in MOR

nodes.name: Receive Sales Order Confirmation
nodes.notes: Triggered by confirmed sales order in ERP

nodes.name: Verify Inventory Availability

thresholds.action: Notify Sales if insufficient; initiate backorder or production request

nodes.notes: Check physical stock vs. order requirements

nodes.name: Generate Pick List
nodes.notes: Auto-generated by WMS based on order and stock location

nodes.name: Pick Items from Warehouse
nodes.notes: Physical picking using pick list; scan barcodes

nodes.name: Verify Picked Quantity and Quality

thresholds.action: Re-pick discrepancies; update inventory records
Reject and replace damaged/defective items

nodes.notes: Critical verification before packing

nodes.name: Pack Items for Shipment
nodes.notes: Use appropriate packaging materials; label boxes

nodes.name: Generate Shipping Documentation
nodes.notes: Packing slip, delivery note, commercial invoice, waybill

nodes.name: Verify Shipping Documentation Accuracy

thresholds.action: Correct errors; regenerate documents if necessary

nodes.notes: Check customer details, product codes, quantities, pricing

nodes.name: Schedule Carrier Pickup
nodes.notes: Coordinate with carrier based on delivery SLA

nodes.name: Load Shipment onto Carrier Vehicle

thresholds.action: Reject damaged pallets; repack if necessary

nodes.notes: Handoff to carrier; obtain proof of pickup signature

nodes.name: Update Order Status to 'Shipped'
nodes.notes: Triggers customer notification email with tracking number

nodes.name: Monitor Shipment in Transit
nodes.notes: Track via carrier portal; escalate delays or exceptions

nodes.name: Confirm Delivery with Customer

thresholds.action: Investigate missing deliveries; file claim with carrier if lost

nodes.notes: Obtain signed POD; resolve delivery discrepancies

nodes.name: Archive Shipping Records
nodes.notes: Store all documents per regulatory retention policy

nodes.notes: Daily stock count of containers at DC level

nodes.name: Empty Container Receipt & Quality Gate

thresholds.action: Reject batch, raise supplier non-conformance
Reject containers, supplier escalation

nodes.notes: CCP: Accepting damaged empties cannot be reversed; contaminates entire inventory pool

nodes.name: Empty Container Inventory Registration

thresholds.action: System blocks registration, alert Plant Stores

nodes.notes: ACW auto-assigns unique container IDs, validates against 12-month history

nodes.name: Production Fill & Batch Code Assignment

thresholds.action: Halt line, re-calibrate, quarantine batch

thresholds.parameter: Batch code match to production log
thresholds.action: Halt invoicing, re-verify batch code, investigate

nodes.notes: CCP: Batch traceability failure irreversible after dispatch; regulatory compliance requirement

nodes.name: Post-Fill Quality Inspection

thresholds.action: Rework or quarantine to NFFP
Re-label, delay release

nodes.notes: Failures route to NFFP pathway (S18)

nodes.name: Filled Container Inventory Update
nodes.notes: ACW moves containers from 'empty' to 'filled' inventory status

nodes.name: Distributor Order Validation

thresholds.action: Order hold, ZSC approval required

nodes.notes: ACW validates distributor return performance before order acceptance

nodes.name: Delivery Note (DN) Generation
nodes.notes: Auto-generated from validated order; DN number used for seal-invoice cross-check

nodes.name: Invoice Generation & Seal-DN Cross-Check

thresholds.action: Halt dispatch, regenerate invoice, investigate
System blocks dispatch until corrected

nodes.notes: CCP: Invoice mismatch creates irrecoverable financial/audit gap; tax compliance requirement

nodes.name: Physical Loading & Seal Application

thresholds.action: ACW blocks duplicate seal, new seal issued

nodes.notes: Photo evidence of sealed truck uploaded to ACW; seal number validated against 12-month database

nodes.name: Truck Dispatch & GPS Tracking Activation

thresholds.action: Truck held at gate until GPS confirmed active

nodes.notes: ETA calculated and sent to distributor via SMS; GPS log retained for shortage investigations

nodes.name: Seal Integrity Verification at Distributor Receipt

thresholds.action: Broken seal → photo evidence to ZSC, physical count before unloading
Late report (>24h) → shortage claim auto-rejected

nodes.notes: CCP: After 24h, evidence of shortage/tampering is lost (seals disposed); irreversible window

nodes.name: Physical Count at Distributor

thresholds.action: Shortage → activate S13 investigation; Overage → report to ZSC within 1 hour

nodes.notes: Zero tolerance variance; any deviation triggers exception pathway

nodes.name: Shortage/Overage Investigation & Transporter Charge

thresholds.action: >3 incidents → suspend transporter, initiate tender review
>7 days unresolved → write-off, escalate to NSM

nodes.notes: GPS log review, photo evidence analysis; transporter performance KPI tracked quarterly

nodes.name: Distributor Stock Registration (Filled)
nodes.notes: ACW updates distributor filled stock based on confirmed DN receipt

nodes.name: Empty Container DN Generation (by Distributor)

thresholds.action: Override >5% requires ZSC approval, investigate system access issue

nodes.notes: ACW auto-generates empty return DN from distributor's ACW empty stock register; reduces manual errors

nodes.name: Empty Collection & Seal Application
nodes.notes: Photo evidence of sealed truck uploaded to ACW

nodes.name: Empty Receipt & Seal Verification at Plant

thresholds.action: Broken seal → photo evidence, physical count with ZSC witness
Variance >1% → recount; confirmed shortage charges transporter

nodes.notes: Recount protocol if variance >1%; GPS log reviewed for route deviations

nodes.name: NFFP Segregation & Age Tracking

thresholds.action: >30 days → escalate to Quality Manager for disposal decision

nodes.notes: ACW auto-tracks NFFP age from segregation date; 30-day countdown triggers alert. Approved containers re-routed to S1 for re-inspection

nodes.name: Empty Container Inventory Update
nodes.notes: ACW moves returned empties to 'available for fill' inventory; triggers production planning update

nodes.name: Credit Note (CN) Issuance
nodes.timing: Within 3 business days of empty receipt

thresholds.action: System blocks issuance until corrected
Delay >5 days escalates to CFO

nodes.notes: ACW auto-calculates CN based on verified empty receipt quantity

nodes.name: DC Monthly Physical Count

thresholds.action: >2% → immediate recount + root cause investigation
>5 days → NSM escalation

nodes.notes: Covers both filled and empty inventory at DC; ACW variance report auto-generated

nodes.name: Distributor Monthly Physical Count

thresholds.action: >2% → immediate recount + root cause investigation
>5 days → NSM escalation

nodes.notes: ZSC witnesses critical counts; covers filled and empty inventory at distributor locations

nodes.name: National Reconciliation (All Locations)

thresholds.action: Delay >Day 7 → NSM notified, board reporting flagged
>0.5% → forensic audit triggered

nodes.notes: ACW consolidates all location counts; variance analysis auto-categorized (in-transit, NFFP, unaccounted)

nodes.name: Quarterly NFFP Review & Disposal

thresholds.action: All NFFP >60 days reviewed for disposal or re-introduction pathway

nodes.notes: Quality Manager approves disposal or re-entry to S1; ACW inventory updated post-decision

nodes.name: Reconcile DC Container Balance with Sales Recon

thresholds.action: Investigate discrepancy and resolve within 48 hours

nodes.notes: Cross-validates distributor container balances against sales records to identify data integrity issues

thresholds.action: If tampered: do not open, inform DCM, DCM/ASM/RSM investigate and conclude before offloading

nodes.notes: CCP: Seal tampering triggers mandatory investigation. No offloading until conclusion.

thresholds.action: Charge transporter: Empty Container cost + Water selling price per short unit

nodes.notes: CCP: Financial recovery point. Charge = Empty Container + Water selling price per short container.

thresholds.action: If seal tampered: reject delivery, inform Orgonia DC/ASM immediately

nodes.name: Report Shortage on Filled Container Receipt

thresholds.action: Report shortage to Orgonia DC/ASM/RSM immediately with driver acknowledgment

nodes.notes: Immediate shortage reporting with driver acknowledgment

nodes.name: Invoice Filled Containers to Retail/Residential/Corporate
nodes.notes: Distributor invoices filled containers to end customers

nodes.name: Receive Empty Containers from Customers
nodes.notes: Distributor collects empty containers from retail/residential/corporate customers

nodes.name: Segregate and Record NFFP Containers at Distributor
nodes.notes: Distributor identifies and segregates NFFP containers for return

nodes.name: Prepare Empty Container DN in ACW for Return to DC
nodes.notes: DN prepared in ACW for empty container return to Orgonia DC

nodes.name: Seal Truck for Empty Container Return to DC

thresholds.action: Document seal number on DN. DC verifies on arrival per S11.

nodes.notes: CCP: Distributor seals truck for empty return. Seal number documented on DN.

nodes.name: Conduct Daily Container Stock Count at DC
nodes.notes: Daily physical stock count of containers at DC

nodes.name: Conduct Weekly Container Stock Count at DC
nodes.notes: Weekly physical stock count of containers at DC by DCC
